improvement: Added a fail-closed validator for Cloudflare environment configuration requests so operator handoffs cannot target an unauthorized repository, workflow, environment, project, or secret name and cannot weaken the privacy contract.

covered: unauthorized repository, workflow, and secret rejected
weakened privacy and missing deployment proof requirements rejected
